subcodes.first_line: The standard of bounty hath been raised aloft upon knowledge, as attested by the Pen and My inscribed Tablet. Know thou its worth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد رفعت رایه الکرم علی العلم یشهد بذلک القلم و لوحی المسطور ان اعرف قدر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
